author: danceratopz
content:
🧪  **`tests-glamsterdam-devnet@v6.1.0`**

Specs & tests bug fix release for a subtle [EIP-2780](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-2780.md) inconsistency with [EIP-161](https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-161): As v6.1.0, EELS charges account creation costs if value is transferred to a precompile with previously zero-balance; this was omitted in previous `v6` releases.

This affected one test; one new test was added. Details in:
- https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/3048
